_note: No upstream examples were published in the TTN ventilo-sensor-codec.yaml. Vectors are synthetic Watteco ZCL standard reports; expected.data values were produced with the ORACLE method by running reference/upstream-codec.js (Decoder, fPort 125, standard report) on each input and normalizing per the authored mapping: differential pressure (cluster 0x8008/32776 attr 0) is a 16-bit value already in Pascals (upstream divide=1, read unsigned) -> pressure.differential; temperature (cluster 0x0402/1026 attr 0) is signed centi-degC /100 -> air.temperature; power descriptor (cluster 0x0050/80 attr 6) is mV/1000 -> battery (V); message type (cluster 0x8004/32772 attr 0) -> messageType extra. Batch frames (byte0 bit0 clear) are reported as an error.

uplink.description: Differential pressure standard report, 100 Pa (cluster 0x8008 attr 0)
Power descriptor report, disposable battery 3.400 V (cluster 0x0050 attr 6, flags 0x04)
LoRaWAN config message type confirmed (cluster 0x8004 attr 0) -> messageType extra
Huffman batch frame (byte0 bit0 clear) is not decodable by a stateless codec
